info.title: Expert Agent MCP Server API
info.description: RESTful API for Expert Agent MCP Server

post.description: Public user registration endpoint (no authentication required).
Authenticate user and return a JWT token.
Revoke a JWT token.
Refresh a JWT token (returns a new token if current token is valid).
Change password for the authenticated local user.

schema.title: Response Change Password Auth Change Password Post

post.description: Admin-only: reset a user's password (local auth only).

schema.title: Response Admin Reset Password Auth Admin Reset Password Post

post.description: Admin-only: create an API key for a user (or unscoped).

schema.title: Response Create Api Key Api Keys Post

get.description: Admin-only: list API keys (never returns plaintext keys).

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Api Keys Get

delete.description: Admin-only: revoke API key by id.

schema.title: Response Revoke Api Key Api Keys  Key Id  Delete

post.description: Admin-only: rotate key (revoke old, create replacement with same scope flags).

schema.title: Response Rotate Api Key Api Keys  Key Id  Rotate Post

get.description: Return current user's API key-related flags (for debugging/testing).

schema.title: Response Get My Api Key Permissions Api Keys Me Get

post.description: Create a new session with concurrency control.

schema.title: Response Get Session Sessions  Session Id  Get
Response Delete Session Sessions  Session Id  Delete

post.description: Add message to session.

schema.title: Response Add Message Sessions  Session Id  Messages Post
Response Get Messages Sessions  Session Id  Messages Get
Response Get Session By Key Sessions Key  Session Key  Get
Response Get History By Key Sessions History  History Key  Get

post.description: Share session with users and/or groups.

schema.title: Response Share Session Sessions  Session Id  Share Post

post.description: Rotate session key.

schema.title: Response Rotate Session Key Sessions  Session Id  Rotate Key Post

post.description: Trigger session summarization.

schema.title: Response Summarize Session Sessions  Session Id  Summarize Post

get.description: Get all summaries for a session.

schema.title: Response Get Summaries Sessions  Session Id  Summaries Get

post.description: Create a new user.

schema.title: Response Get User Users  User Id  Get
Response Update User Users  User Id  Put
Response Delete User Users  User Id  Delete

post.description: Create a new group.

schema.title: Response Get Group Groups  Group Id  Get
Response Update Group Groups  Group Id  Put
Response Delete Group Groups  Group Id  Delete

get.description: Get all members of a group.

schema.title: Response Get Group Members Groups  Group Id  Members Get

post.description: Add member to group.

schema.title: Response Add Group Member Groups  Group Id  Members Post

post.description: Assign a user as group admin.

schema.title: Response Assign Group Admin Groups  Group Id  Admins Post
Response Get Group Admins Groups  Group Id  Admins Get

delete.description: Remove group admin role from user.

schema.title: Response Remove Group Admin Groups  Group Id  Admins  User Id  Delete
Response Update Member Role Groups  Group Id  Members  User Id  Role Put
Response Remove Group Member Groups  Group Id  Members  User Id  Delete

post.description: Create a new expert configuration.

schema.title: Response Get Expert Experts  Expert Id  Get
Response Update Expert Experts  Expert Id  Put
Response Delete Expert Experts  Expert Id  Delete

post.description: Create a new channel.

schema.title: Response Get Channel Channels  Channel Id  Get
Response Delete Channel Channels  Channel Id  Delete

get.description: Get LLM configuration for a channel.

schema.title: Response Get Channel Llm Config Channels  Channel Id  Llm Config Get

post.description:
Chat with a channel (sync or async mode).

- Sync mode: Returns response immediately
- Async mode: Returns job ID, response available via job status or webhook

schema.title: Response Channel Chat Channels  Channel Id  Chat Post

get.description:
Get channel history based on scope.

- scope=channel: All messages from all sessions in this channel
- scope=user: All messages from a specific user in this channel (requires user_id)
- scope=session: All messages from a specific session (requires session_id)

schema.title: Response Get Channel History Channels  Channel Id  History Get

post.description: Map a vector store to a channel.

schema.title: Response Add Channel Vector Store Channels  Channel Id  Vector Stores Post

get.description: Get all vector stores mapped to a channel.

schema.title: Response Get Channel Vector Stores Channels  Channel Id  Vector Stores Get

delete.description: Remove a vector store mapping from a channel.

schema.title: Response Remove Channel Vector Store Channels  Channel Id  Vector Stores  Vector Store Id  Delete
Response Get Knowledge History Knowledge  Knowledge Type   Knowledge Id  Get

delete.description: Delete knowledge entry or all knowledge.

schema.title: Response Delete Knowledge Knowledge  Knowledge Type   Knowledge Id  Delete

post.description: Add knowledge entry.

get.description: List knowledge entries accessible to user.

schema.title: Response Update Knowledge Knowledge  Knowledge Type   Knowledge Id   Entry Id  Put
Response List Knowledge Versions Knowledge  Knowledge Type   Knowledge Id  Versions Get
Response Rollback Knowledge Knowledge  Knowledge Type   Knowledge Id  Rollback Post
Response Replace Knowledge Knowledge  Knowledge Id  Put

post.description: Merge complementary knowledge (AT1.11).

schema.title: Response Merge Knowledge Knowledge  Knowledge Id  Merge Post

get.description: List all jobs with filters (admin only).
Get job details with full information (admin only).

schema.title: Response Get Job Jobs  Job Id  Get
Response Remove Job Jobs  Job Id  Delete

post.description: Resubmit a failed or cancelled job (admin only).

schema.title: Response Resubmit Job Jobs  Job Id  Resubmit Post

post.description: Stop a running job (admin only).

schema.title: Response Stop Job Jobs  Job Id  Stop Post
Response Get Queue Status Jobs Queue Status Get

post.description: Upload a file using base64 content and store it in configured storage.

schema.title: Response Upload File Base64 Files Upload Base64 Post

post.description:
Upload a multimedia file and store it in configured storage.

Notes:
- This endpoint stores the file on disk via MultimediaManager and records metadata in DB.
- Supported formats and size limits are enforced by MultimediaManager config (no fallbacks).

schema.title: Response Upload File Files Upload Post

post.description:
Translate a stored text/document file using the LLM configuration from an expert config.
Produces a new stored file record and returns it.

schema.title: Response Translate File Files  File Id  Translate Post

post.description: Ingest a stored text/document file into a configured vector store (as a document).

schema.title: Response Ingest File To Vector Store Files  File Id  Ingest To Vector Store Post

get.description: List all files with metadata (admin only).

schema.title: Response Get File Metadata Files  File Id  Get
Response Delete File Files  File Id  Delete

post.description: Bulk delete files (admin only).

schema.title: Response Bulk Delete Files Files Bulk Delete Post
Response Get Storage Stats Files Storage Stats Get

post.description: Generate a prompt from expert description.

schema.title: Response Generate Prompt Prompts Generate Post

post.description: Generate test cases for expert configuration.

schema.title: Response Generate Test Cases Prompts Test Cases Post

post.description: Validate a prompt against requirements.

schema.title: Response Validate Prompt Prompts Validate Post

post.description: Validate LLM configuration before channel activation.

schema.title: Response Validate Llm Validation Llm Post

post.description:
Validate a prompt against requirements using the configured LLM.

This is the canonical REST entrypoint for AT1.45/AT1.46.

schema.title: Response Validate Prompt Validation Prompt Post

post.description: Evaluate response quality for a job.

schema.title: Response Evaluate Response Quality Evaluate Post

post.description: Submit user feedback on response quality.

schema.title: Response Submit Feedback Quality Feedback Post

get.description: Get quality metrics for a job.

schema.title: Response Get Quality Metrics Quality Job  Job Id  Get

post.description: Run comprehensive test suite for expert configuration.

schema.title: Response Run Expert Test Suite Testing Expert Suite Post
Response Get Audit Events Audit Get
Response Get Audit Event Audit  Event Id  Get

get.description: Admin-only: return raw stored fields (for encryption-at-rest verification).

schema.title: Response Get Audit Event Raw Audit  Event Id  Raw Get

get.description: Admin-only: verify audit event signature integrity.

schema.title: Response Verify Audit Event Signature Audit  Event Id  Verify Get

get.description: Export audit logs in specified format.

List long-running operations with optional filters.

Args:
    operation_type: Filter by operation type
    status: Filter by status
    limit: Maximum number of results
    offset: Offset for pagination
    db: Database session
    x_api_key: API key for authentication

Returns:
    List of operation status dictionaries

Get operation status by ID.

Args:
    operation_id: Operation ID
    db: Database session
    x_api_key: API key for authentication

Returns:
    Operation status dictionary

schema.title: Response Get Operation Status Operations  Operation Id  Get

post.description:
Cancel a long-running operation.

Args:
    operation_id: Operation ID
    request: Cancellation request with optional reason
    db: Database session
    x_api_key: API key for authentication

Returns:
    Updated operation status

schema.title: Response Cancel Operation Operations  Operation Id  Cancel Post

post.description: Create a new vector store configuration.

schema.title: Response Create Vector Store Vector Stores Post
Response List Vector Stores Vector Stores Get
Response Get Vector Store Vector Stores  Store Id  Get

put.description: Update vector store configuration with options support.

schema.title: Response Update Vector Store Vector Stores  Store Id  Put
Response Delete Vector Store Vector Stores  Store Id  Delete

get.description: Health check a configured vector store (connectivity + basic provider readiness).

schema.title: Response Health Check Vector Store Vector Stores  Store Id  Health Get

post.description: Add a document to a collection in the vector store (will be embedded automatically).

schema.title: Response Add Document Vector Stores  Store Id  Documents Post

put.description: Update a document in a collection.

schema.title: Response Update Document Vector Stores  Store Id  Documents  Doc Id  Put

delete.description: Delete a document from a collection.

schema.title: Response Delete Document Vector Stores  Store Id  Documents  Doc Id  Delete

post.description: Query documents in a collection (semantic search).

schema.title: Response Query Documents Vector Stores  Store Id  Query Post
Response Get Service Services  Service Id  Get
Response Update Service Services  Service Id  Put
Response Delete Service Services  Service Id  Delete
Response Check Service Health Services  Service Id  Health Post
Response Api Documentation Docs Api Get

post.description: MCP chat tool endpoint.

ChannelChatRequest.description: Request model for channel chat endpoint
